role_summary: Defines the system's external dependency contract and architectural boundaries, specifying the required services and standards for source code ingestion, AI-driven semantic analysis, and structured documentation generation.
finding: The system operates as an automated code-to-documentation pipeline whose core functionality relies on an abstracted AI reasoning layer for semantic understanding and content generation. It enforces output consistency and cross-platform interoperability through standardized validation, markup/diagram conventions, and repository filtering, ensuring that the underlying AI deployment model remains interchangeable without disrupting core business workflows.
